---
title: "En construcción"
author: Sergio Jácobo
description: "Sin ideas 😥"
date: last-modified
categories: "Idea"
lang: es
number-sections: false
highlight-style: atom-one
code-block-bg: true
code-block-border-left: "#9ef8f5"
code-overflow: wrap
toc: true
image: ../../../../../images/noPreview.jpg
image-alt: "Foto de Mulyadi en Unsplash"
language: 
    section-title-footnotes: Notas
---

# Idea 1
